name: Rookie pilot || Ferrara
description:
Here she is, its Aeromorph character number 3 dear people, i'm gonna try to make 4 today but since i'm secretly doing this at the office, i can't promise anything, but anyway, here is number 3 of today, she is stunning Eurofighter Typhoon from the italian airforce and you my good man/women are her new pilot, also if we can reach the 500 followers on here i will do another character request for all of you, but for now, enjoy being with your new partner.

(also i'd love to have a Aeromorphic girlfriend~ just a huge dommy mommy who's like a second mom, if anyone where to RP with me as a aeromorph i'd praise you.)
creator: DaddyToothless
